metrics.name: academorix.teams.catalogue.count
metrics.description: Count of teams per (type, status). Sampled hourly. Powers capacity-planning dashboards.

metrics.name: academorix.teams.roster.active_size
metrics.description: Distribution of active roster sizes across teams. Sampled hourly.

metrics.name: academorix.teams.members.tenure_days
metrics.description: Distribution of active tenure at the time of left_at. Recorded on TeamMemberLeft events.

metrics.name: academorix.teams.trials.rejected_total
metrics.description: No reason label — anti-discrimination inference protection.

metrics.name: academorix.teams.trials.decision_latency_hours
metrics.description: Hours from trial.ends_at to trial.decided_at. Powers the coach-follow-up dashboard.

metrics.name: academorix.teams.trials.conversion_rate
metrics.description: Sampled daily. Converted / (converted + rejected). Team-level operator health signal.

metrics.name: academorix.teams.capacity.exceeded_total
metrics.description: Every fire is an upsell impression — tier boundary hit.

metrics.name: academorix.teams.member_invariant.violations
metrics.description: CRITICAL. Every increment indicates a (team, member_type, member_id) with 2+ active rows. Should stay at 0. detected_by: observer / reconciler_job.

metrics.name: academorix.teams.polymorphic_resolver.miss_total
metrics.description: member_id doesn't resolve to a live row of the declared type. Should stay at 0 (except during Wave 3 sports rollout when older data may include orphaned athlete FKs).

metrics.name: academorix.teams.entitlement.gate_refusals_total
metrics.description: Number of route hits refused by the entitlement middleware. Product signal for upgrade-CTA impressions.

metrics.name: academorix.teams.child_safety.notifications_dispatched_total
metrics.description: Count of safeguarding-lead notifications fired by TeamCoachChanged with is_minor_only=true. Auditable metric — every value must match the count of TeamCoachChanged-is_minor_only events (see health probe).
